title: Darina CG artist
goal: to create a neat awwwards-level portfolio that would highlight client’s work instead of drawing user’s attention away from it
tasks: Emphasize the elitizm of client’s services without going over the top
Keep the website lightweight given hi-res imagery
Make website’s content easily editable by the client
solutions: Webflow as a platform to ease website support via it’s CMS
Stick to pure CSS and JS animations as much as possible to keep the asset weight to the minimum
Lazy-load all non-crucial assets to achive faster loading
Use page transition animation to create a feeling of smooth and swift navigation
Utilize all HTML5 and ARIA capabilities and CSS performance optimization techniques to improve accessibility, user experience and SEO
